title: Better Essentials UI
description: this pack make everything look like the essentials mod in minecraft
body:
**this pack fixs alot of stuff that the user [KartoffelChipss](https://modrinth.com/user/KartoffelChipss) didn't add to "Essential UI" like**

1. Essentials looking modmenu

2. Essentials looking ineventory

3. every other menu is Essentials looking now

4. normal hotbar 

5. normal hotbar slot selector

**WHY SHOULD YOU DOWNLOAD THIS TEXTURE PACK?**

1. if you have [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) then you shouold know the feeling of the buttons on your mian menu and [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) not matching well this texture pack fixes this problem

2. even if you don't have [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) then this texture pack can e used as a dark mode texture pack
